headline: How The Deere (DE) Investment Narrative Is Shifting As Optimism Meets Valuation Concerns
summary: Deere's fair value anchor sits at US$665.10, with the latest update keeping that price target unchanged even as some inputs around growth and returns are refined. This stability comes while many analysts lift their price targets into the US$700s on the back of Q1 execution and raised guidance, and a smaller group questions whether the recent move in the stock already embeds an optimistic earnings path. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these mixed signals and keep up with the...
